game_info.title: Twist 3D
game_info.concept:
Stay on the platforms and do as many jumps as you can.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/twist/id1052231801

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Stay on the platforms and do as many jumps as you can.

Just tap the screen to jump and twist the platforms. Try not to fall off the edges!

Collect gems to unlock new balls and platform colors.

What is your best score ?
game_info.description: Twist 3D is a fast-paced infinite runner where you control a rolling ball on a twisting path floating in the void. The path generates procedurally with gaps, turns, and collectibles. Your goal is to survive as long as possible by jumping over gaps and turning at corners to stay on the platforms. Collect gems to increase your score and unlock visual color themes. The speed increases gradually, testing your reflexes!
game_info.controls:
- ENTER: Start the game
- ARROW KEYS (Left/Right): Turn 90 degrees left or right
- SPACE: Jump over gaps
- ESC: Pause / Resume
- R: Restart game (when Game Over)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify that the player moves forward automatically when the game starts.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Start the game in TEST_1 mode. Record the initial Z position of the player. Wait for 60 frames. Compare the new Z position to the initial position to ensure movement occurred.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player's position should have changed significantly along the forward axis, indicating automatic movement logic is functioning.

TEST_1.strategy: Start the game in TEST_1 mode. Record the initial Z position of the player. Wait for 60 frames. Compare the new Z position to the initial position to ensure movement occurred.
TEST_1.expected: The player's position should have changed significantly along the forward axis, indicating automatic movement logic is functioning.

TEST_2.strategy_description: Start game. Wait a few frames. Simulate a SPACE key press. Monitor the player's Y velocity and vertical position over the next 30 frames.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The player's Y position should increase (rise) and then decrease (fall) due to gravity, and Y velocity should be positive immediately after the input.
TEST_2.strategy: Start game. Wait a few frames. Simulate a SPACE key press. Monitor the player's Y velocity and vertical position over the next 30 frames.
TEST_2.expected: The player's Y position should increase (rise) and then decrease (fall) due to gravity, and Y velocity should be positive immediately after the input.

TEST_3.strategy_description: Start game. Wait 10 frames. Simulate a RIGHT ARROW key press. Check the player's velocity vector before and after the input.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: The player's velocity vector should change from (0, 0, -speed) to (speed, 0, 0) (or similar orthogonal change), indicating a 90-degree turn.
TEST_3.strategy: Start game. Wait 10 frames. Simulate a RIGHT ARROW key press. Check the player's velocity vector before and after the input.
TEST_3.expected: The player's velocity vector should change from (0, 0, -speed) to (speed, 0, 0) (or similar orthogonal change), indicating a 90-degree turn.

TEST_4.test_description: Verify collision detection with platforms (staying on ground).
TEST_4.strategy_description: Start game. Allow player to roll on the starting platform segment. Monitor the `onGround` status flag in the player entity.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: The `onGround` flag should remain true while the player is moving along the initial safe straight path.
TEST_4.description: Verify collision detection with platforms (staying on ground).
TEST_4.strategy: Start game. Allow player to roll on the starting platform segment. Monitor the `onGround` status flag in the player entity.
TEST_4.expected: The `onGround` flag should remain true while the player is moving along the initial safe straight path.

TEST_5.test_description: Verify Game Over condition when falling off.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Start game. Turn perpendicularly to the path immediately (walking off the edge). Wait until Y position falls below the threshold (e.g., -10).
TEST_5.expected_outcome: The `gameState.gamePhase` should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" once the player falls below the kill threshold.
TEST_5.description: Verify Game Over condition when falling off.
TEST_5.strategy: Start game. Turn perpendicularly to the path immediately (walking off the edge). Wait until Y position falls below the threshold (e.g., -10).
TEST_5.expected: The `gameState.gamePhase` should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE" once the player falls below the kill threshold.

TEST_6.strategy_description: Spawn a collectible directly in the player's path. Move player through it. Check score increment and collectible removal.
TEST_6.expected_outcome: The score should increase by the collectible value, and the collectible entity should be removed from the active entities list.
TEST_6.strategy: Spawn a collectible directly in the player's path. Move player through it. Check score increment and collectible removal.
TEST_6.expected: The score should increase by the collectible value, and the collectible entity should be removed from the active entities list.

TEST_7.strategy_description: Start game. Press ESC. Wait 30 frames. Check if player position has remained static.
TEST_7.expected_outcome: The game phase should be "PAUSED" and game entities should not update their positions.
